summarySection.summary: Quinn Taylor is a software engineer with a strong foundation in automation and project management, demonstrating transferable skills relevant to civil engineering roles. Experienced in developing workflows and tools that enhance operational efficiency, Quinn is adept at collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful solutions.

experience.description:
• Engineered automation tools that streamlined operational workflows for IT and compliance teams, significantly enhancing task scheduling and monitoring capabilities.
• Collaborated with design teams and engineers to develop and optimize frontend workflows and backend APIs, ensuring seamless integration and functionality.
• Implemented task orchestration and backend processing workflows using Django, Celery, Redis, and PostgreSQL, facilitating efficient job scheduling and real-time updates.
• Achieved a reduction of approximately 3 hours per week in manual task management for internal IT teams through the development of centralized scheduling and monitoring tools.

• Developed centralized scheduling and monitoring tools that reduced manual task management, debugging, and log-checking time by ~3 hours per week for internal IT teams.
• Built internal automation tools that allowed IT and compliance teams to schedule, monitor, and manage operational workflows through a centralized web platform.
• Developed task orchestration and backend processing workflows using Django, Celery, Redis, and PostgreSQL to support scheduled jobs, logging, and live task updates.
• Worked closely with design teams, engineers, and offshore developers to build and refine frontend workflows, backend APIs, and real-time operational tooling.
